dismissal_note.description: Optional free-form note explaining the dismissal. Capped at 4000 characters.

dismissal_reason.description: Optional short reason code for the dismissal (e.g. 'not_a_bug', 'wont_fix', 'duplicate'). The set of reason codes is owned by the caller and is not validated server-side.

id.description: A UUID string identifying this signal report.

snooze_for.description: Optional, only honored when state is 'potential'. Number of additional signals the report must accumulate before it is re-promoted into the pipeline — effectively snoozing it until then. Omit to let the report re-enter the pipeline on the next matching signal.

state.description:
Target state for the report. Use 'suppressed' to dismiss the report from the inbox, or 'potential' to snooze/reopen it for later review.

* `suppressed` - suppressed
* `potential` - potential
